recipe.title: Focaccia
recipe.description: This epic focaccia recipe is a real classic, with three tasty toppings to take it to the next level. You'll never buy focaccia again!

ingredients.name: fine semolina flour
ingredients.note: plus extra for dusting (if you can’t get hold of any semolina flour then plain flour will

steps.descr: Follow the basic recipe until Step 8, then split the...
steps.instructions: Follow the basic recipe until Step 8, then split the dough into half or quarters.

on_enter.say: Follow the basic recipe until Step 8, then split the dough into half or quarters.

steps.descr: Roll or push it out to an oval shape roughly 1
steps.instructions: Roll or push it out to an oval shape roughly 1.5cm thick; don’t fuss around for perfection, it’s supposed to be rough and rustic, so what a great excuse for a beginner!

on_enter.say: Roll or push it out to an oval shape roughly 1.5cm thick; don’t fuss around for perfection, it’s supposed to be rough and rustic, so what a great excuse for a beginner!

steps.descr: Place on a baking tray liberally dusted with semolina,...
steps.instructions: Place on a baking tray liberally dusted with semolina, and spread evenly with your chosen topping (see tips).

on_enter.say: Place on a baking tray liberally dusted with semolina, and spread evenly with your chosen topping (see tips).

steps.descr: Finally, make those characteristic holes by pushing all...
steps.instructions: Finally, make those characteristic holes by pushing all your fingers deep into the dough many times, which allows the flavour of the topping to penetrate.

on_enter.say: Finally, make those characteristic holes by pushing all your fingers deep into the dough many times, which allows the flavour of the topping to penetrate.

steps.descr: Leave to prove again in a warm place and after about 45...
steps.instructions: Leave to prove again in a warm place and after about 45 minutes it will prove to that classic 3cm high.

on_enter.say: Leave to prove again in a warm place and after about 45 minutes it will prove to that classic 3cm high.

steps.descr: Bake for about 15 minutes at full whack (240°C/475°F/gas...
steps.instructions: Bake for about 15 minutes at full whack (240°C/475°F/gas 9) until ready. As soon as the focaccia comes out of the oven, feed it with a good drizzle of your very best extra virgin olive oil and a light scattering of sea salt. You can eat the focaccia as soon as it has cooled slightly.

on_enter.say: Bake for about 15 minutes at full whack (240°C/475°F/gas 9) until ready. As soon as the focaccia comes out of the oven, feed it with a good drizzle of your very best extra virgin olive oil and a light scattering of sea salt. You can eat the focaccia as soon as it has cooled slightly.
